_description: Canonical registry of market regimes recognised by MarketRegimeBot. All entries are informational only. No entry carries execution authority or runtime trading effect.

regimes.label: Bull Market
regimes.description: Sustained upward price trend across broad market indices with improving breadth and positive momentum.

regimes.label: Bear Market
regimes.description: Sustained downward price trend of 20% or more from recent highs across broad market indices.

regimes.label: Sideways Market
regimes.description: Range-bound price action with no clear directional trend. Also known as a consolidation or ranging regime.

regimes.label: High Volatility
regimes.description: Elevated implied or realised volatility relative to historical norms. Typically associated with VIX above 25–30.

regimes.label: Low Volatility
regimes.description: Suppressed implied or realised volatility relative to historical norms. Typically associated with VIX below 15.

regimes.label: Risk On
regimes.description: Market participants are favouring higher-risk assets (equities, high-yield, commodities) over safe-havens.

regimes.label: Risk Off
regimes.description: Market participants are rotating into safe-haven assets (bonds, gold, USD) away from risk assets.
